summary: Recent B.S. Computer Science graduate with a cybersecurity emphasis. Hands-on experience building full-stack, security-aware, and AI-assisted systems using Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, C++, FastAPI, React/Next.js, PostgreSQL, external API integration, diagnostics, and production deployment.

education.school: Example State University, Tempe, AZ | School of Computing
details: Relevant Coursework: Computer Network Security, Distributed Software Development, Computer Forensics, Information Assurance, Human-Computer Interaction, Probability & Statistics.

skills.label: Languages
skills.skills: Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, C++, Java, SQL, C#, Bash, Assembly (x86-64)

skills.label: Backend & Data
skills.skills: FastAPI, Pydantic, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Docker, Git/GitHub, Linux/Unix

skills.skills: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Vercel, React Query

skills.label: Security & AI
skills.skills: Wireshark, Nmap, Ghidra, GDB, RBAC, OWASP, API integration, prompt engineering

projects.title: Market Analytics & Risk Platform
bullets: Built and deployed a full-stack analytics platform that ingests live market data, normalizes external API responses, calculates expected value, and tracks user outcomes through authenticated workflows.
Integrated public data feeds, database policies, deployment bridge routes, and readiness diagnostics for production traffic.
Shipped beta diagnostics including admin health checks, scheduler heartbeats, readiness endpoints, and external-tester analytics.

projects.title: AI Simulation & Diagnostics Lab
bullets: Developed deterministic Python simulations for evaluating decision policies across generated scenarios and configurable environment behaviors.
Built counterfactual sweeps, policy-band reports, encounter attribution, balance gates, and automated tests to identify weak policies and regression risks.
Designed a strict Pydantic/YAML content pipeline with cross-reference validation and JSON save/load.

projects.title: Network Security & Offensive Operations Laboratory
bullets: Completed 50+ CTF challenges across web, network, and binary exploitation, scripting attacks with Python and analyzing packet captures for protocol anomalies.
Reverse engineered x86-64 binaries with Ghidra and GDB, crafting buffer-overflow and ROP-chain exploits to bypass memory protections.
Conducted web and network security testing across SQL injection, XSS, command injection, packet analysis, and protocol-level anomaly detection workflows.

additionalExperience.title: STEM Education & Robotics Instructor
bullets: Taught robotics programming concepts to student groups, translating loops, conditionals, and robotics logic for non-technical audiences.

additionalExperience.title: Software Engineering Bootcamp
bullets: Completed API and cloud architecture training; built a deployed prototype automating data-retrieval tasks.
